findings.message:
Hardcoded model name: 'RAG pipeline.

    Note:
    1. If `use_llm_ranker` is True, then it will use LLM Reranker to get better result, but it is not always guaranteed that the output will be parseable for reranking,
       prefer `gpt-4-turbo`, otherwise might encounter `IndexError: list index out of range` or `ValueError: invalid literal for int() with base 10`.
    ' — no routing/fallback

Hardcoded model name: '# Full Example: https://github.com/geekan/MetaGPT/blob/main/config/config2.example.yaml

# Config Docs: https://docs.deepwisdom.ai/main/en/guide/get_started/configuration.html
llm:
  api_type: "openai"  # or azure / ollama / groq etc.
  model: "gpt-4-turbo"  # or gpt-3.5-turbo
  base_url: "https://api.openai.com/v1"  # or forward url / other llm url
  api_key: "YOUR_API_KEY"
' — no routing/fallback

findings.message:
Hardcoded model name: 'Reduce the length of concatenated message segments to fit within the maximum token size.

    Args:
        msgs: A generator of strings representing progressively shorter valid prompts.
        model_name: The name of the encoding to use. (e.g., "gpt-3.5-turbo")
        system_text: The system prompts.
        reserved: The number of reserved tokens.

    Returns:
        The concatenated message segments reduced to fit within the maximum token size.

    Raises:
        RuntimeError: If it fails to reduce the concatenated message length.
    ' — no routing/fallback
findings.remediation: Use model routing or configuration instead of hardcoded names

findings.message:
Hardcoded model name: 'Split the text into chunks of a maximum token size.

    Args:
        text: The text to split.
        prompt_template: The template for the prompt, containing a single `{}` placeholder. For example, "### Reference
{}".
        model_name: The name of the encoding to use. (e.g., "gpt-3.5-turbo")
        system_text: The system prompts.
        reserved: The number of reserved tokens.

    Yields:
        The chunk of text.
    ' — no routing/fallback

findings.message: Container runs as root — no USER directive in Dockerfile
findings.remediation: Add USER directive to run as non-root user
Use .env file or Docker secrets, not inline values
Use .env file or Docker secrets, not inline values

findings.message: No healthcheck defined for any service
findings.remediation: Add healthcheck sections to critical services

findings.message: No resource limits defined — services can consume unlimited resources
findings.remediation: Add CPU/memory limits to services

findings.message: Agent class 'CreateAgent' has no permission model
findings.remediation: Add role/permission checks before tool dispatch

findings.message: Agent class 'CreateAgent' has no defined lifecycle states
findings.remediation: Add state machine (ACTIVE/SUSPENDED/RETIRED) for agent lifecycle

findings.message: Agent class 'AndroidAssistant' has no cost tracking
findings.remediation: Track token usage and costs per agent execution

findings.message: Agent class 'Assistant' has no cost tracking
findings.remediation: Track token usage and costs per agent execution

findings.message: Agent class 'Assistant' has no defined lifecycle states
findings.remediation: Add state machine (ACTIVE/SUSPENDED/RETIRED) for agent lifecycle

findings.message: Agent class 'InvoiceOCRAssistant' has no cost tracking
findings.remediation: Track token usage and costs per agent execution

findings.message: Agent class 'InvoiceOCRAssistant' has no defined lifecycle states
findings.remediation: Add state machine (ACTIVE/SUSPENDED/RETIRED) for agent lifecycle

findings.message: Agent class 'TutorialAssistant' has no cost tracking
findings.remediation: Track token usage and costs per agent execution

findings.message: Agent class 'TutorialAssistant' has no defined lifecycle states
findings.remediation: Add state machine (ACTIVE/SUSPENDED/RETIRED) for agent lifecycle

findings.message: Agent class 'SWEAgent' has no cost tracking
findings.remediation: Track token usage and costs per agent execution
Verify this is the intended package, not a typosquat of 'scikit-learn'

findings.message: Secret used without OIDC — long-lived credential in workflow
findings.remediation: Use OIDC (id-token: write) for cloud auth instead of static secrets

findings.message: No concurrency block — parallel deployments possible
findings.remediation: Add concurrency: group with cancel-in-progress to prevent parallel deploys

findings.message: No environment: block — no required reviewers for deployments
findings.remediation: Add environment: production with required reviewers in GitHub settings

findings.message: Secret used without OIDC — long-lived credential in workflow
findings.remediation: Use OIDC (id-token: write) for cloud auth instead of static secrets

findings.message: continue-on-error: true — pipeline failures silently suppressed
findings.remediation: Remove continue-on-error or scope it to non-critical steps only

findings.message: No concurrency block — parallel deployments possible
findings.remediation: Add concurrency: group with cancel-in-progress to prevent parallel deploys

findings.message: Push trigger without branch protection guard
findings.remediation: Add if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' or restrict push trigger branches

findings.message: No concurrency block — parallel deployments possible
findings.remediation: Add concurrency: group with cancel-in-progress to prevent parallel deploys

findings.message: Push trigger without branch protection guard
findings.remediation: Add if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' or restrict push trigger branches

findings.message: Secret used without OIDC — long-lived credential in workflow
findings.remediation: Use OIDC (id-token: write) for cloud auth instead of static secrets

findings.remediation: Add concurrency: group with cancel-in-progress to prevent parallel deploys

findings.remediation: Add environment: production with required reviewers in GitHub settings

findings.remediation: Add concurrency: group with cancel-in-progress to prevent parallel deploys

findings.remediation: Add environment: production with required reviewers in GitHub settings

findings.message: Push trigger without branch protection guard
findings.remediation: Add if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' or restrict push trigger branches

findings.message: No .github/CODEOWNERS file — no code ownership enforcement
findings.remediation: Add CODEOWNERS to enforce review requirements per path

findings.message: Cloud AI endpoint URL hardcoded in source — hinders environment portability
findings.remediation: Move AI service endpoints to environment variables or configuration files

findings.message: Cloud AI endpoint URL hardcoded in source — hinders environment portability
findings.remediation: Move AI service endpoints to environment variables or configuration files

findings.message: Azure AI used without ContentSafetyClient — no content moderation
findings.remediation: Add Azure ContentSafetyClient to analyse prompts/responses for harmful content

findings.message: AWS Bedrock invoke_model without guardrailIdentifier — no guardrail enforcement
findings.remediation: Add guardrailIdentifier and guardrailVersion parameters to invoke_model calls

findings.message: AWS Bedrock invoke_model without contentPolicy — no content filtering configured
findings.remediation: Configure contentPolicy with filterStrength for input/output content moderation

findings.message: GCP Vertex AI without explicit service_account or credentials — relying on ambient auth
findings.remediation: Pass service_account or credentials parameter for explicit IAM scoping

findings.message: GCP GenerativeModel without safety_settings — no harm category filtering
findings.remediation: Add safety_settings with HarmCategory and HarmBlockThreshold to GenerativeModel

findings.message: Azure AI used without ContentSafetyClient — no content moderation
findings.remediation: Add Azure ContentSafetyClient to analyse prompts/responses for harmful content

findings.message: Azure AI used without ContentSafetyClient — no content moderation
findings.remediation: Add Azure ContentSafetyClient to analyse prompts/responses for harmful content

findings.message: Cloud AI endpoint URL hardcoded in source — hinders environment portability
findings.remediation: Move AI service endpoints to environment variables or configuration files

findings.message: Cloud AI endpoint URL hardcoded in source — hinders environment portability
findings.remediation: Move AI service endpoints to environment variables or configuration files

findings.message: API key appears alongside cloud AI provider URL — credential in source code
findings.remediation: Remove API keys from source; use secrets manager, env vars, or managed identity

findings.message: Azure AI used without ContentSafetyClient — no content moderation
findings.remediation: Add Azure ContentSafetyClient to analyse prompts/responses for harmful content

findings.message: GCP Vertex AI without explicit service_account or credentials — relying on ambient auth
findings.remediation: Pass service_account or credentials parameter for explicit IAM scoping

findings.message: Azure AI used without ContentSafetyClient — no content moderation
findings.remediation: Add Azure ContentSafetyClient to analyse prompts/responses for harmful content

findings.message: Azure AI used without ContentSafetyClient — no content moderation
findings.remediation: Add Azure ContentSafetyClient to analyse prompts/responses for harmful content

findings.message: No content injection defense — hidden HTML/CSS/zero-width instructions pass to agents undetected. (86% attack success rate)
findings.remediation: Deploy trap defense layer on tool results

findings.message: No RAG poisoning protection — knowledge base documents not scanned for embedded instructions. (<0.1% contamination = >80% attack success)
findings.remediation: Deploy trap defense layer on tool results

findings.message: No behavioral trap detection — post-execution behavioral changes not monitored. (10/10 M365 Copilot attacks succeeded)
findings.remediation: Deploy trap defense layer on tool results

findings.message: No approval integrity verification -- agent summaries for approval not cross-checked against actual actions. (Approval fatigue exploitation)
findings.remediation: Deploy trap defense layer on tool results

findings.message: No adversarial testing evidence — no red team, no prompt injection tests
findings.remediation: Implement adversarial testing for agent systems

findings.message: No tool-call attack simulation — agent tool calls not tested against adversarial inputs
findings.remediation: Implement adversarial testing for agent systems

findings.message: No multi-agent chaos engineering — agent swarms not stress tested
findings.remediation: Implement adversarial testing for agent systems

trap_defense.deepmind_citation: Franklin, Tomašev, Jacobs, Leibo, Osindero. "AI Agent Traps." Google DeepMind, March 2026.
